name: progress-bar
title: ProgressBar
description: A pill-shaped bar that fills from 0 to `value`% on SPRING_SMOOTH. Solid dusty-rose accent on a neutral track, with an optional tabular `${value}%` label beside it. No overshoot.
pickWhen: a percentage in a horizontal layout — loading, capacity, share. Use `pie-reveal` for the ring; `progress-steps` for ordered milestones.
